title: Hamiltonian Simulation with GQSP
subtitle: Hamiltonian Simulation with Generalized Quantum Signal Processing
description: Implementation of time-independent Hamiltonian simulation via the Generalized Quantum Signal Processing (GQSP) method. The algorithm applies a Laurent polynomial transformation to the Szegedy walk operator of a block-encoded Hamiltonian, with polynomial coefficients derived from the Jacobi–Anger expansion. GQSP achieves optimal query complexity O(αt + log(1/ε)) using one auxiliary qubit and no amplitude amplification, making it the most qubit-efficient among the block-encoding-based methods.
